content_preservation: Instructor contact information (name, email, office location, office hours) is missing
structural_coherence: Course title 'Research' is not formatted as a header or clearly associated with the course number header
Headers '# Course Information' and '# Required Late Work Policy' are H1s but should likely be H2s for proper document hierarchy under the main course title

proposals.reasoning: The section 'Required Late Work Policy' with its accompanying text 'Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).' appears to be institutional boilerplate, referencing a specific 'Student Rule 7'. If this exact text and header appear verbatim across all syllabi, it should be stripped entirely as per the boilerplate definition.
